Bash(/Applications/MAMP/Library/bin/mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -u cat6852_user_incidencia -puEmF8zbcH5mJXRtOGU cat6852_incidencias -e "
ALTER TABLE doc_spaces
    ADD COLUMN main_image VARCHAR\(500\) DEFAULT NULL AFTER restrictions,
    ADD COLUMN calendar_color VARCHAR\(20\) NOT NULL DEFAULT '#198754' AFTER main_image;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS doc_space_photos \(
    id INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    space_id INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    file_path VARCHAR\(500\) NOT NULL,
    original_name VARCHAR\(255\) DEFAULT NULL,
    sort_order INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY \(space_id\) REFERENCES doc_spaces\(id\) ON DELETE CASCADE
\) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
" 2>&1)
Bash(/Applications/MAMP/Library/bin/mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -u cat6852_user_incidencia -puEmF8zbcH5mJXRtOGU cat6852_incidencias -e "DELETE FROM doc_spaces WHERE code=''''TEST-001'''';")
